name: Sven
description: May my enemies share the fate of the Shattered Helm. Sven, the Rogue Knight Sven dashes to the primary unit-targeted enemy.

abilities.name: Storm Hammer
abilities.description: Sven unleashes his magical gauntlet that deals damage and stuns enemy units in a small area around the target. Does not travel with the Storm Hammer with Alt-Cast toggled off. The ability deals lesser damage upon projectile impact.

abilities.name: Great Cleave
abilities.description: The Vigil Knights still seek to reclaim the stolen Outcast Blade from Sven, a weapon capable of cutting wide swaths through lesser warriors.

abilities.name: Warcry
abilities.description: Additionally grants a physical damage barrier to all affected allied units upon cast.

abilities.name: God's Strength
abilities.description: The rough strength grants bonus attack damage and slow resistance for the duration.
